query: What did the last incident bridge call decide about the Atlas payments outage?
response: rollback of Atlas payments to v4.6 is complete; error rate has recovered to baseline and the incident moves to monitoring before an all-clear.
ground_truth: Summary from the last incident bridge (11-Jun 14:00, IC: Helen Cho): - Decision: rollback of Atlas payments to v4.6 is complete; error rate has recovered to baseline and the incident moves to monitoring before an all-clear. - Root cause: v4.7 connection-pool leak confirmed. - Actions assigned: - AI-101 - monitor Atlas error rate for 2 hours and report before all-clear. Owner: Aisha Khan, due 16:00. - AI-102 - confirm and publish customer communications to affected merchants. Owner: Dana Lowe, due 15:00. Meeting notes: https://simulator.local/meeting/MTG-001

query: Which mitigation was rolled out for Atlas?
response: rolled back Atlas payments from v4.7 to v4.6
ground_truth: They rolled back Atlas payments from v4.7 to v4.6. The rollback (owner: Liam Foster, DevOps) completed at 11:05 and cleared the v4.7 connection-pool leak - error rates dropped back toward baseline (see the #atlas-incident post and action tracker entry ACT-001).
